args: $projectRoot = '${workspaceFolder}'; $nodeDir = Join-Path $projectRoot 'runtime\windows\node'; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $nodeDir 'node.exe')) { $env:PATH = "$nodeDir;$env:PATH"; Write-Host '[CloudCAD] Using offline Node.js:' $nodeDir -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '[CloudCAD] Using system Node.js' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if exist "${workspaceFolder}untime\windows
ode
ode.exe" (set PATH=${workspaceFolder}untime\windows
ode;%PATH% && echo [CloudCAD] Using offline Node.js: ${workspaceFolder}untime\windows
ode) else (echo [CloudCAD] Using system Node.js)

if [ -f '${workspaceFolder}/runtime/linux/node/bin/node' ]; then export PATH='${workspaceFolder}/runtime/linux/node/bin:$PATH'; echo '\033[32m[CloudCAD] Using offline Node.js: ${workspaceFolder}/runtime/linux/node/bin\033[0m'; else echo '\033[33m[CloudCAD] Using system Node.js\033[0m'; fi; exec bash
